Who's got a virtual machine and is about to play through an exciting round of TextWorld? You do! Here is how to play! First thing I need you to do is to attempt to take a trip west. If you can accomplish that, go west. If you can finish that, take a trip north. Next, make an effort to head east. Then, recover the coin from the floor of the workshop. Got that? Good!
